title: ビッグなドリーム、めしあがれ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Today's 1,400-meter scrimmage has begun! All eyes are on Hishi
Akebono and Biko Pegasus!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Bono, you're really on fire today, huh? Weeell, so am I!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono soars down the course with explosive speed. No one
would believe me if I told them about the day before.

text_block_list.name: Observing Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's the big racer over there, right? She always makes the
tastiest food for everyone at the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Observing Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's her! I knew she was huge, but next to Biko Pegasus, her
size is extra obvious!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
All right, the racers have entered the homestretch! In the lead is Hishi
Akebono, followed closely by Biko Pegasus! Will Hishi Akebono
outrun her, or will she be overtaken?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
(Huh? Why do my legs feel so heavy... Ah, right, I didn't get much
sleep last night.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's it all right. But so what?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's eyes sparkle as she locks eyes with the path ahead
of her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, everybody, I'm giving this race everything I got!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And no one can overtake me when I give 100%!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
First to cross the finish line is Hishi Akebono! Hishi Akebono is our
winner! She managed to inch ahead for a narrow victory!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Yippee!

text_block_list.name: Fellow Racer
text_block_list.text: You really are a force to be reckoned with on the track, Bono. You're such a gentle giant, I sometimes forget the giant part.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. Well, it's a race, right? No way I could smile after a race where
I didn't give it my all. Isn't that right, Biko? ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I know I'm in for a real fight when you're in the roster!
...But losing still hurts!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Next time, victory will be mine! I swear it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer! I thought you left to rest. You didn't have to come, but
well, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Likewise, I'd like her to rest after this race and the day we had
yesterday, but before I can convey that thought...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me! I'm having a chanko party after this! Would you like
to join us? ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Come and get it, everybodyyy! I promise the flavor is super-duper
buono. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After witnessing how Hishi Akebono flitted about the kitchen just now, I seriously wonder if her energy has any limit. Lured by the aroma, students steadily file into the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That means you too, Trainer! I made more than enough, so be sure to
eat your fill.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: YUM! I could eat this all day!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ooh, you added ginger and perilla leaves to the fish balls... And it's real good. I'm stealin' that idea!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Seein' y'all sittin' 'round the table and laughin' reminds me of home!
This meal's delicious!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I-it really is... And the vegetables you used are so hard to come by.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Phew, everyone's got a bowl, right? Then it's my turn to dig iiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking down at my bowl, I recognize some vegetables inside. They
look just like the ones I dropped in the river...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Freshly picked veggies really do make the best stew.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I sure did. I mean, the whole reason we were collecting
ingredients yesterday was for this party.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
After all, I wanted to give my friends a super-duper scrumptious bowl
of chanko after a race.
choice_data_list: But why would you go so far...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Why? Because after giving your all, you've gotta eat buono food with
your friends!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Tracen is just like a sumo dojo, Trainer! We only get stronger when we
compete with everything we've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking past Hishi Akebono, I notice the content faces of each of her
classmates as they chow down on their chanko.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Arrrgh! I was right theeere! A little more, and I would've won!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Don't get too down on yourself. You showed some real guts out there.
How about doing some stamina training with me?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think 'bout it, you've been really goin' at it in the
mornings, Suzuka. How far are you runnin' these days?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ummm... To the closest mountain... I think.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ I'm glad everyone's having a good time.
choice_data_list:
(This must be what she meant by being a pot of
chanko.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to be there for her rivals—not just as fierce competition,
but as a fellow racer to grow alongside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just like her, her ambitions are big and good-natured.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end though, there can be only one winner. There may come a
time when her ideals block her way forward.
choice_data_list:
(I'll just have to be there for her when that
happens.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More and more students stop by the hot pot party, and the festive
atmosphere continues until right before curfew.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Trainer, what's wrong? You're really spacing out today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where did that come from?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Hishi Akebono desired, all the students who came to the hot
pot party left with a smile and a full belly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If anyone can become a pot of chanko and bring a smile of
satisfaction to everyone else... it's her.
choice_data_list: Your dreams have my full support.
Your dreams have my full support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hishi Akebono's big, bright eyes grow even bigger as I continue.
choice_data_list: Let's turn you into a big pot of chanko.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Okay! Thank you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's right! As thanks for tagging along with me yesterday, I
baked you some cookies!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I baked them with lots and lots of love, so I can promise a buono
taste! ♪ Say "ah"!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I steel my resolve to make her dreams come true, starting with her
debut, I take a bite. My mouth fills with a soft, sweet warmth...
